fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Master toggle. When off, the cashback offer is never shown to diners.

fields.label: Minimum Order Amount
fields.description: Orders below this are not eligible. 0 = any completed order.

fields.label: Max Claims per Customer / Month
fields.description: How many UGC cashback claims a single customer can make per calendar month at this restaurant.

fields.label: Proof Upload Window (hours)
fields.description: Hours after the order within which the diner must upload the view-count proof.

fields.label: Monthly Cashback Budget (Cash)
fields.description: Total cashback this restaurant will issue per month. 0 = unlimited. When exhausted, the offer is hidden.

fields.label: Issued This Month
fields.description: Rolling counter, auto-reset each calendar month.

fields.label: Cashback Cap (% of order)
fields.description: Maximum cashback as a percentage of the order amount. Default 100%.

fields.label: Absolute Cap per Claim (Cash)
fields.description: Hard ceiling on a single cashback, regardless of views or order amount.

fields.label: AI Provider
fields.description: Model used to read the view count from the proof video. Gemini 2.5 Flash recommended (lowest cost).

fields.label: Auto-Approve Confidence Threshold
fields.description: Below this confidence the claim is routed to staff review instead of auto-credited. 0-1.

fields.label: Template Images
fields.description: Pre-approved story images the diner can share. Upload via the dashboard.

fields.label: Coupon for Story Viewers
fields.description: Existing coupon (from Manage Offers & Coupons) shown to the diner's friends who see the story.

fields.label: Next-Visit Coupon for Poster
fields.description: Existing coupon rewarded to the diner for their next visit.

fields.label: What the diner must do
fields.description: Short instructions shown on the offer screen (e.g. tag us, keep story live 24h).
